content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：深港幽靈之船，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：深港幽靈之船
一艘遠航的行船，要將眾人帶往何方？
那純白的神女，正坐在高高的桅杆上歌唱。
貪婪、癡妄、掙扎與背叛，她視若無睹，她不歌唱命運的翻覆，她只歌唱，那老船長的歸航。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Ghost Ship of Deep Harbor》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Ghost Ship of Deep Harbor》 
Where will a ship on a long voyage take everyone?
The pure white goddess was sitting on the tall mast and singing.
She turned a blind eye to greed, delusion, struggle and betrayal. She did not sing about the ups and downs of fate, but only sang about the old captain's homecoming.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：深港幽靈之船
